title: Seminar on “Cyber Security” by expert Mr. Akash Dhakad on 3rd  August  2024
description:
Seminar was conducted on “Cyber Security” for MCA students by expert Mr. Akash Dhakad on 3rd  August  2024 ( 2:00 pm - 4:00 pm).
Seminar was organized by Dr. Jyoti Kharade, Mr. Manish Dubey, Ms. Shravani Pawar, Dr. Pratibha Deshmukh.
Proamtech Global Technologies Private Limited, an innovative startup committed to equipping professionals and students with the skills necessary to thrive in the fast-evolving tech industry which is specialized in providing courses in CCNA, Linux, and Cybersecurity. Our training programs are designed to be highly practical, ensuring that participants gain hands-on experience and industry-relevant skills.

Mr. Akash Dhakad Conducted seminar to share knowledge and insights on current trends in the IT industry which was beneficial, providing students with valuable insights into the current demands of the IT industry and how they can enhance their employability and technical expertise.


The seminar covered the following topics:


1. An overview of current industry trends and future projections.

2. Detailed information on the practical applications of CCNA, Linux, and Cybersecurity skills.

3. Live demonstrations and case studies showcasing real-world scenarios of threats like phishing, key-logging and call-spoofing.

4. Interactive Q&A session to address any questions from the faculty and students.

title: Seminar on "Global Technology Trends 2024"
description:
Bharati Vidyapeeth’s Institute of Management and Information Technology, Navi Mumbai has Organized Seminar on Boost your Carrier with IT.
The aim of organizing this Seminar is to provide the knowledge of Information Technology in Carrier Boost.
The Seminar was conducted by Vikash Tripathi of  Kirti Computers and his team members who are dealing with the development and maintenance and marketing of Kirti Computers.

title: Seminar on “Digital Marketing”, organized by ISTE Student Chapter
description:
Subject: Seminar on “Digital Marketing”, organized by ISTE Student Chapter
Date: 16th March 2024
A highly informative and engaging session on Digital Marketing was organized by Bharati Vidyapeeth’s Institute of Management and Information Technology in association with the ISTE student chapter. We were delighted to have an eminent personality from the industry Dr. Arati Agarwal, Director of Vocskills. 
Attendees learned about the importance of digital marketing in today's business environment and were introduced to basic concepts such as identifying target audiences and setting clear objectives. Through interactive activities and easy-to-understand examples, beginners gained confidence in navigating key digital marketing channels like social media, email, and SEO. Objective
•	Introduction to digital marketing fundamentals and its significance in contemporary business landscapes.
•	Understanding target audience demographics, behaviors, and preferences to tailor marketing efforts effectively.
•	Setting clear and measurable goals aligned with business objectives to drive successful digital marketing campaigns.
•	Overview of essential digital marketing channels, including SEO, SEM, social media, email, and content marketing.
•	Introduction to basic analytics tools and metrics for tracking campaign performance and optimizing strategies for better results.

title:
Seminar
On
"How to transform Oneself to become a Successful Entrepreneur/Employee in the Rapidly Changing World"
description:
“Understanding the changing landscape have different parameters including technology, data, funds, pricing, quality, work culture, customer expectations are the needs for entrepreneurships. Industry revolution and society 5.0 with respect to people and performance is important. Big data benefits, Generative AI reshaping the future for businesses. Employee-Employer partnership and mentorship is need for modern workforce and are the traits for successful employees”, explains Lt. Col. Sanjay Shrivastava.
As a management mentor advising startups and young professionals, understands the importance of nurturing talent and fostering a culture of excellence. Vision-driven approach and dedication to organizational growth make him an invaluable asset to education institutions seeking to adapt and thrive in an ever-evolving landscape. By leveraging expertise in leadership, innovation, and strategic planning, to help educational institutions shape the future leaders of tomorrow. 
Bharati Vidyapeeth’s IMIT Navi Mumbai IIC and IQAC organized Expert Talk on “How to transform Oneself to become a Successful Entrepreneur/Employee in the Rapidly Changing World?”, dated 26-Feb-2024. The expert talk was conducted by eminent speaker Lt. Col. Sanjay Shrivastava which was organized for MCA students of BVIMIT by Dr. Pratibha Deshmukh, Ms. Shubhangi Mahadik, Dr. Kirti Muley, Principal Dr. Suhasini Vijaykumar and vice Principal Dr. Jyoti Kharade BVIMIT attended the session.

title:
Seminar
On
“Effective Research Paper Writing”
description:
Objectives:Students will  familiarize with writing effective research papers and promote research among them.
•	Develop research skills, improve project management skills, enhance scientific report writing skills, and build credibility in the scientific community
•	Identify parts that comprise a scientific research paper
•	Understand some different ways scientists develop ideas for their research
•	 Understand the advantages of conducting a literature search 
•	Understand the process of writing a research paper
•	Outline the steps of the research writing process
•	The structure of the research paper
•	Prepares students for future research careers by teaching them how to conduct scientific inquiries in a structured manner

Date: 30/10/2023, 01/11/2023
	Time: 2.00 am to 5.00 pm

Evaluators

	
Speaker: 
Dr. Priya Chandran
Assistant Professor, BVIMIT, Navi Mumbai

Key Learning and Take-Always

•	Identify reasons to research writing projects.
•	Outline the steps of the research writing process.
•	Choose a topic.
•	Plan and schedule time to research and write.
•	Conduct research.
•	Organize research and ideas.
•	Draft your paper.
•	Revise and edit your paper
•	Plagiarism Report

title: Seminar on “Stress Management and Sitting Postures" by Apollo Hospital Navi Mumbai”
description: BVIMIT, Navi Mumbai IQAC and Women Development Cell organized an informative webinar and training session on " Stress Management and Sitting Postures by Apollo Hospital Navi Mumbai” 13-Sep-2023 in association with Apollo Hospital Navi Mumbai. In the session sitting posters while using laptop/computer and mobile devices at work place was given to the faculties and students. Stretching training exercises during day to day work was demonstrated by the speaker Dr. Shalushubham Keni(PT), B.P.T,M.P.Th(Cardio-respitory). She gave remedies to reduces fatigue, increase blood supply to muscles and Prevent Muscle Strain Injuries, Increase Muscle Coordination and Balance by improving Posture.All teaching staff and students from Bharati Vidyapeeth IMIT Navi, Mumbai belapur campus took benefit of the session.

title: Demo Day “Ideation for Analysis of Data in the Capital Market”
description: Bharati Vidyapeeth Institute of Management and Information Technology (BVIMIT) organized Demo day on “Ideation for Analysis of Data in the Capital Market” on October 28th, 2023. In this, students need to give their innovation ideas in the field of Capital Market. During demonstration, students need to cover the scope and objective along with the utility of specific idea. It also includes the hardware and software requirements to do analysis of data along with the advantages and limitations of the idea presented. Group of 2-3 students present the idea in about 10 minutes and 5 minutes were given for discussion. Industry expert Mr. Manojit Barui Vice President, Nomura Services Pvt. Ltd was the judge for the program. Fourteen groups of students participated enthusiastically in the event. Best two ideas were declared as winner.

title: Seminar on "Business Model with New Startup an it's Challenges"
description: Bharati Vidyapeeth Institute of Management and Information Technology (BVIMIT) organized one day seminar on “Business Model with new startup and its challenges” on June 9th, 2023 in BVIMSR seminar hall. The seminar focused on how the business model serves as a roadmap, guiding entrepreneurs in their decision-making processes and providing a clear framework for sustainable growth.. The programme started at 1:00 pm with the felicitation of guest. The dignitaries on the dias were Prof.  Devendra Pimputkar, 15 years of rich corporate experience, Masters in Information Technology from Mumbai University, CEO with Techfer Global Pvt Ltd, Core experty in Business Intelligence and Analytics, Motivational speaker on ancient history of India, Inspiring characters, Business   Development and selfless nationalisms.Mr. Devendra Pimputkar has highlighted some points during the seminar on "Business Model with New Startup and Its Challenges" which aims to equip entrepreneurs and aspiring startup founders with the knowledge, insights, and practical tools needed to develop robust business models. By exploring the critical components of a strong business model and addressing the common challenges faced by startups, the seminar seeks to empower participants to create successful and sustainable ventures.It aims to inspire and guide participants in their entrepreneurial endeavors, enabling them to navigate the complexities of the startup landscape and build businesses that thrive in the face of challenges. Along the students , faculty members of MCA department were also participated in this seminar.  The seminar was Organised by Start Up Committee under IIC Ms Gunjan Bhel Ms. Nidhi.

title: Health Talk on "Mental health and Cherish your human connection
description: BVIMIT, Navi Mumbai IQAC and Women Development Cell organized an informative seminar and training session on " Mental health and Cherish your Human Connection” Saturday 27-April-2023 in association with Apollo Hospitals, Navi Mumbai. In the session how to improve Mental health and how we can Cherish every moment of life was given to the faculties and students. Dr. Rituparna Ghosh, Consultant Physiocologist Apollo Hospitals. She gave remedies to reduces stress to all teaching staff and students from which Bharati Vidyapeeth IMIT Navi, Mumbai belapur campus took benefit of the session.

Ms Gunjan Bhel,

title: “Effective Research paper Writing”
description:
R&D Cell of Vidyapeeth’s  Institute of Management Information Technology (BVIMIT), Navi Mumbai organized a webinar on “Effective Research paper Writing”,   on 13/December/2022 at 1.30 pm for MCA Sem IV  students. 
Resource Person: Dr. Priya Chandran, BVIMIT
The webinar covered the following stages of writing: 
•	Preliminary Thought and Discussion
•	Research 
•	Organization
•	Writing 
•	Revising 
•	Editing
A research paper is a piece of academic writing that provides analysis, interpretation, and argument based on in-depth independent research. Writing a research paper requires demonstrating a strong knowledge of your topic, engaging with a variety of sources, and makes an original contribution to the debate. The structure of the research paper was discussed during the session. The students were clear about the basic steps of research as well as how to incorporate and document outside source material in a research project. The step-by-step guidelines discussed will help the students to rough the entire writing process, from understanding the problem to proofreading their final draft.

title: Webinar on Android Programming
description:
Bharati Vidyapeeth’s IMIT organized a webinar for MCA students on “Android
programming” on 10th Sep 2022. Ms. Sanakhatun S. Shaikh, Sr.Programmer Analyst,
Mobicule Technologies Pvt.Ltd. was the Industrial Expert for this event. This webinar
was conducted to aware students about the various domains of Rest API applications
and publish android application, a student should know. In this webinar, students
come to know various Rest APIs implemented. In this webinar, speaker demonstrates
how the RESTful APIs help for make your mobile app more reliable, portable,
simplified, and visible. She talks about various Mobile APIs can enhance the core
features of an app, like GPS data and databases. This will improve the experience on
each mobile device of end users. The session came to an end, with a vote of thanks.

title: SAP Session and Business Intelligence
description:
On 6th and 7th May 2022 Team from SSIT had visited our college to interact with the students and to sign an Memorandum of Understanding between SSIT and Bharati Vidyapeeth’s Institute of Management and Information Technology. We had Mr. Sri, CEO and MD SSIT at our campus having more than 16 years of experience in Technology and Management took session on SAP for Day 1 and Business Intelligence on Day 2. 
At the onset he briefed the students about the company and the latest technology upon which the currently is working and also the areas where the students must get certified to find a suitable job in the IT market.
He briefed the students about SAP and ERP and also provided a brief history about SAP. How processes are working in SAP and what kind of projects the students can expect in this technology. He also briefly spoke about SAP architecture and some live examples pertaining to it.
On Day 2 Mr. Sri took session on Business Intelligence. It was again a 2 hr session. He briefed the students about the past, present and future of this technology to the students. He discussed as to what remarkable changes this brings to all levels of the business domain. He also discussed about the keys stages of BI and gave live examples and latest trends and what would be the impact of students learning this technology. Towards the end there was Question and Answer round where the students asked the questions promptly and cleared all their doubts. It was a remarkable and fruitful interaction for the students.

title: 3D Printing Technology
description:
Bharati Vidyapeeth’s IMIT organized a webinar for MCA students on “3D Printing Technology" on 3rd June 2022. Dr. Yogi Gandhi, CEO of USI3DT, California. This webinar was conducted to aware students about the the new technology of 3D Printing.

Session commenced with the brief introduction of the guests and about the 3D printing technology. Dr. Gandhi explore the various areas where the 3 D Printing is already have a great impact such as medical, civil and many more. This technology is already established firmly in US. It’s still an emerging technology in India. The basic aim for conducting this seminar was to aware students about 3D printing technology which is able to give more details in less time as compared to conventional printing. The entire session was interactive, so that students can get the feel how this technology works. Students are able to see how 3D printer works and how it’s end product looks. Students are also able to resolve the quarries regarding the technology.  The session came to an end, with a vote of thanks proposed by Ms. Tejashree.

title: One Day FDP and SDP on DATA WAREHOUSING – HANDS ON SESSION
description:

                                  Prof. Sudeshna Roy, Assistant Professor

Inaugural address was given by Dr. Suhasini Vijay Kumar, Principal, BVIMIT. This online hands on session was conducted to understand creating dimensional data warehouse model, ETL, Working with Google Cloud Platform(GCP) and AMA session . Vote of thanks was given by Mrs. Sudeshna Roy and  online feedback was taken from participants.

title: Webinar on “Let’s Play with Simulation”

title: Webinar on “A Structured Approach for an Effective Presentation"
description:
Bharati Vidyapeeth’s IMIT organized a webinar for MCA students on “A Structured Approach for an Effective Presentation" on 26th September 2020. Ms. Neetu Choudhary,
Continuous Improvement Leader, Dubai, was the guest speaker for this event. This webinar was conducted to tell students about how to give an effective presentation.

The first session of the webinar commenced with an introduction to the PDCA CYCLE (Plan, Do, Check and Act) for preparing presentation. Each phase of the cycle was discussed briefly. In the second session, a sample presentation was discussed with students to get their suggestions regarding the improvement in the existing presentation. Ms. Choudhary, also discuss the benefits of the effective presentation. Additionally, she also shared few tips and tricks that can be used while presenting the presentation.

title: Webinar on “Fundamental Human Rights as Enshrined in the Constitution of India”

title: Skill Development Program on "Full Stack Development".
description:

 Study Material covering Full Stack Content, Full Stack Presentation, Problem Statement with Solution and Assignment & E-Certificate were given to all the Participants

Resource person was Mr. Ankur Ranjan, from vPhrase Analytics solutions Pvt. Ltd. was the resource person for 4 days program. 40 Faculty members and 30 Students participated in the Skill development Program from various places like Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Pune, Gujrat,Sindudurga, Bihar, Tamil Nadu, Chatisgad, Palghar, Assam and Ratnagiri
Topics covered were installation of Django, understanding Git, setting up version control,python core, Django framework , implementing full stack application using Django, cloud application deployment, domain setup etc. Students and Faculty members were made aware about the Career options that would pave the way for brilliant career opportunities.
The session was interactive and students and Faculty members were benefied.

title: Webinar on “Big Data, Data Analytics, Data Science and Career Opportunities”
description: Bhartiy Vidyapeeth’s IMIT organized a webinar for MCA students on “Big Data, Data Analytics, Data Science and Career Opportunities” on 8th May 2020. Dr. Pranjal Muley, Associate Dean IT in VESIM, Mumbai, is the resource person for the same. Through this webinar students got aware of various opportunities in the field of Data Science/ Data Analytics.

title: Personality Development Program
description: On 24th April 2020 Mr. Yogesh Sharma, ScaleOn Technologies Inc. had conducted PDP session for our MCA SEM IV students via Zoom from 9:30 am to 11:00 am. He conducted Group Discussion with the students based on assertive communication on multiple topic using zoom class rooms.. The session was very interesting. The session ended with a vote of thanks being offered to the dignitary.

title: Seminar on "21st Century Skilling Awareness Program"
description:
BVIMIT conducted seminar on "21st Century Skilling Awareness
          Program" on 13-Jan-2020 for MCA Sem II students by Mr. Sunil
          Tatkar M.D. ProTeen(A UNIDEL Company).

title: Seminar on "Agile Software Development"
description:
BVIMIT conducted Seminar on "agile software
                  development" on 11-Oct-2019 for MCA Sem I students in
                  association with CSI mumbai chapter and TCS.

title: Seminar on red hat Linux
description:
BVIMIT conducted a seminar on red hat Linux on 27th
                    Sep 2019 by Mr.Shyam Khadarkar of Red Hat Academia
                    Ultramax for MCA I and III year students.

title:
Seminar on Breast Cancer Awareness by Women
                      Development Cell
description:
Seminar on "Breast Cancer Awareness” organized by
                      BVIMIT Women Development Cell on 27 September 2019
                      for MCA girl’s student and female staff. In the
                      seminar health awareness regarding Breast Cancer
                      was discussed. The Dr. Sapna Chaudhari (Jain),
                      Consultant, Obstetrics & Gynaecology consulted
                      with students how to manage breast cancer,
                      prevention and awareness.

title: Seminar On Digital Marketing
description:
BVIMIT conducted a seminar on Digital Marketing on
                      17th July 2019 by Mr.Abdul Rahman Nazim for MCA
                      III and V year students

title: Seminar On Data Analytics
description:
BVIMIT conducted a seminar on Data analytics on 13
                      March 2019 by Mr.Premanjan Biswas from Imarticus
                      for MCA I and II year students

title: Seminar On Effective Research Paper Writing -
description:
Seminar On Effective Research Paper Writing was
                      organized by the Institute for the
                      Faculties,students of MCA SEM IV & MCA SEM VI on
                      15th Feb 2019.Resource person for the seminar was
                      Dr.M.Sasikumar,Director of CDAC Mumbai.

title: Session on Emerging Technologies 2019
description:
BVIMIT conducted a Session on Emerging
                      Technologies 2019 on 9 January 2019 by Harpreet
                      Singh of AHY Consultancy for MCA II year students.

title: Seminar On Ethical Hacking -
description:
Seminar on"Ethical Hacking" for MCA (1st, 2nd)year
                      students was organized by BVIMIT on 9 January 2019
                      by Mr.Rizwan Shaikh. In the seminar students were
                      educated about Ethical Hacking.

title: Seminar by Women Development Cell -
description:
Seminar on"Health Awareness Talk for Female
                      students" for MCA (1st, 2nd,3rd)year girls
                      students was organized by BVIMIT Women Development
                      Cell on 8 Oct 2018. In the seminar health
                      awareness regarding PCOS was discussed.The doctor
                      consulted with students how to manage PCOS
                      Nutrition, Exercise,Lifestyle.Preventing
                      Cardiovascular Disease, Diabetes and Other
                      Complications in Women with PCOS.

title: Seminar on Cloud computing -
description:
BVIMIT conducted a seminar on Cloud computing
                      technology on 25 september 2018 by Vishal Patil of
                      Folispy Pvt Ltd for MCA students.

title: SEMINARS
description:
“The seminar on Oracle ERP was conducted by Depth
                      Consulting Services Private Limited" “The seminar
                      on RPA (Robotic Process Automation) a product of
                      Automation Anywhere was conducted by Tech
                      Education and Automation anywhere University" “The
                      seminar on Personality Development Program was
                      conducted by TCS ION" “The seminar on Ethical
                      Hacking was conducted by Mr. Rizwan Shaikh
                      Pristine InfoSolutions" “The seminar on Mind
                      management was conducted by Mr. Jotiram Dighe,
                      Dighe hypnotherapy centre
                      (www.dighehypnotherapy.com)"
